data.body:
[1st Place on Korea Apple App Store]

Thanks to the support of our Sensei, Blue Archive made first place in the Korea Apple App Store!
Log in now to get an appreciation gift!

- Appreciation Gift: 10-Recruitment Ticket x1
- Claim Period: 8/23 (Wed) 9:00 AM – 8/30 (Wed) 02:59 PM (UTC)

#BlueArchive![I8PQixjSBFVtEVHEipad01xwkz9mRHba.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/I8PQixjSBFVtEVHEipad01xwkz9mRHba.jpg)
